subject: load forecasting model and load projection model

emails.subject: Load forecasting model and load projection model
emails.subject_base: Load forecasting model and load projection model
emails.body: Load forecasting model and load projection model Both of these are capitalized terms in rev 23. Is there a difference? Load Projection Model is in definitions, but Load Forecasting Model is used quite a bit. ckm

emails.subject: RE: Load forecasting model and load projection model
emails.subject_base: Load forecasting model and load projection model
emails.body: RE: Load forecasting model and load projection model They are the same terms. Go with the one in the Definitions. Reagan C. Rorschach Enron North America 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002 713.345.3363 To: Rorschach, Reagan; Fairley, David
